package.name: multibot_description
package.description: AIR26 workshop 03 — the patrol unit: a self-contained perceptbot-style skid-steer rover (chassis, 4 wheels, 3 ultrasonics, front camera) PLUS ArUco marker panels on its BACK and RIGHT faces so the other units can see and identify it. The Webots world spawns three namespaced units (r1/r2/r3) + a fixed ground/world-anchor marker.
